# omada_port_profiles (Data Source)

Lists all switch port profiles on the Omada Controller for the configured site.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "omada_port_profiles" "all" {}

output "port_profiles" {
  value = data.omada_port_profiles.all.port_profiles
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `port_profiles` (Attributes List) List of port profiles. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--port_profiles))

<a id="nestedatt--port_profiles"></a>
### Nested Schema for `port_profiles`

Read-Only:

- `dot1x` (Number) 802.1X: 0=port-based, 1=mac-based, 2=disabled.
- `id` (String) The port profile ID.
- `name` (String) The port profile name.
- `native_network_id` (String) The native (untagged) network ID.
- `poe` (Number) PoE setting: 0=disabled, 1=enabled, 2=use profile default.
- `tag_network_ids` (List of String) Tagged network IDs.
- `type` (Number) Profile type: 0=All, 1=Disable, 2=Custom.
